acceptPreview.title: Acceptance Preview
acceptPreview.emptyDescription: No preview data is available for this invoice
acceptPreview.formulaDescription: The new price is calculated using the weighted average of old stock and new incoming stock to ensure accurate pricing
acceptPreview.formulaExample: Example: If old stock is 60 at a price of 60 SAR, and incoming stock is 554 at a price of 100 SAR, then the new price = (60×60 + 100×554) ÷ 614 = 99 SAR
acceptPreview.hasErrorsDescription: Some items have errors and must be reviewed before you can proceed with accepting this invoice
acceptPreview.previewReady: Preview is ready — review changes before accepting

bulkUpload.title: Bulk Order Upload
bulkUpload.description: You can upload a large number of orders at once using an Excel file (a template compatible with order creation, without IDs)
bulkUpload.step1Description: Download the Excel template and fill it with order data (OrderRef, customer, product SKU, quantity, price, etc.)
bulkUpload.step2Description: Fill in customer and order details carefully. Use the same OrderRef for all rows of the same order, and use the product SKU code.
bulkUpload.dragDrop: Drag the file here or click to choose
bulkUpload.uploadNoCreated: No orders were created. Check the file and errors.

distribution.title: Order Distribution
distribution.normalDescription: Distribute orders to a specific employee
distribution.selectEmployeeAndOrders: Please select an employee and orders
distribution.selectStatusToLoadOrders: Select a status to load available orders
distribution.noFreeOrders: No available orders in this range
distribution.selectStatusFirst: Select a status first to show orders
distribution.noOrdersAvailable: No orders available for this status
distribution.selectStatusToSeePreview: Please select statuses first to preview distribution
distribution.noOrdersAvailableForSelection: No orders available based on the selected statuses or dates

retrySettings.globalDescription: Control the automatic customer contact flow and route orders after the response timeout ends
retrySettings.enableRetryDesc: If the customer does not answer, the system automatically retries contacting them several times until the order is received or retries are exhausted
retrySettings.retryLimitsSubtitle: How many times the system tries, and how long it waits between attempts
retrySettings.maxRetriesDesc: The number of times the system tries to contact the customer before stopping and changing the order status (3 is recommended)
retrySettings.retryIntervalDesc: The number of minutes the system waits before making the next attempt
retrySettings.workingHoursDesc: When enabled, the system will not send any attempts outside the specified hours — useful to avoid disturbing customers at night
retrySettings.autoMoveTitle: Automatically move the order after retries end
retrySettings.autoMoveSubtitle: If the customer does not respond after all attempts, the order automatically moves to another status you choose
retrySettings.autoMoveHint: Example: choose "No Response" or "Under Review" so the order appears in a list that needs manual follow-up
retrySettings.retryStatusesSubtitle: The system automatically retries contact only when the order is in one of these statuses
retrySettings.retryStatusesHint: Example: choose "Pending Confirmation" and "Pending" — orders in these statuses are the ones the team contacts
retrySettings.confirmationStatusesSubtitle: If the order reaches one of these statuses, the system stops retrying and considers it completed
retrySettings.confirmationStatusesHint: Example: choose "Confirmed" and "Paid" — once the order reaches this status, there is no need to call again

shipping.autoSendDesc: When the order reaches the specified trigger status, the system automatically creates a shipment without manual intervention
shipping.routingDesc: Choose the shipping company and define the status that triggers shipping
shipping.noCompanies: No active shipping companies — enable one from integrations settings
shipping.triggerStatusDesc: As soon as the order moves to this status, the system automatically sends it to the shipping company
shipping.paymentOptionsDesc: Define the payment requirement the system should check before approving shipment
shipping.requireFullPaymentDesc: The order will not be shipped unless fully paid — disable this to allow partial payment
shipping.partialThresholdDesc: Enter the minimum prepaid amount required for the order to be accepted for shipping — leave it at "0" to accept any amount
shipping.requirePaymentConfirmDesc: A supervisor must review and approve the payment manually before automatic shipping starts
shipping.otherOptionsDesc: What the system does automatically after successfully creating the shipment
shipping.autoLabelDesc: After creating the shipment, the system generates a PDF label and attaches it to the order
shipping.notifyOnShipmentDesc: Send a notification to the assigned employee as soon as shipping is completed successfully
shipping.allowReturnDesc: This option allows reverse shipments (returns) to be created directly through the selected shipping company
shipping.disabledHint: Enable the toggle above so the system automatically sends confirmed orders to the shipping company once they reach a certain status

retrySettings.notifyEmployeeDesc: The assigned employee receives a notification every time the system tries to contact the customer
retrySettings.notifyAdminDesc: A notification is sent to the admin when all attempts end with no response — to follow up on delayed orders
retrySettings.notificationPreviewText: Reminder: Order #12345 has not been confirmed yet — please follow up with the customer

myOrders.title: My Assigned Orders
myOrders.subtitle: View all orders assigned to you
myOrders.noOrdersDescription: You do not have any assigned orders at the moment
